description: Implement ledger routing mechanism and next actor governance contract as per roadmap item 11. Create governance/ledger_router_contract.md defining routing rules, writer path responsibilities, and next actor selection governance to enable systematic task handoff between roles.
routing_decision_basis: Roadmap progression: items 9-10 completed, advancing to item 11 LEDGER ROUTER + LEDGER WRITER + NEXT ACTOR GOVERNANCE CONTRACT
